name: Avecho Biotechnology Limited
analysis: AVE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0150. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0180, stop A$0.0109, target A$0.0393 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
